basic_details.job_title: DGFT Hyderabad Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Director General of Foreign Trade (DGFT Hyderabad) Young Professional (Legal) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DGFT Hyderabad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DGFT Hyderabad Young Professional (Legal) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years as on 10 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: LLM from a recognized University with minimum 70% marks
qualification.details: LLM from a recognized University with a minimum of 70% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DGFT Hyderabad Young Professional (Legal) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Young Professional (Legal) position at DGFT Hyderabad is 20th June 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Young Professional (Legal) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an LLM degree from a recognized university with a minimum of 70% marks to be eligible for the Young Professional (Legal) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years as of 10th June 2026. No minimum age limit is specified.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional (Legal) position in the DGFT Hyderabad recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 60,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Young Professional (Legal) is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DGFT Hyderabad office located?
faq.answer: The DGFT Hyderabad office is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with a pincode of 500080.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions for application. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from any recognized university are encouraged to apply.
